summary: Tested promo code discount feature end-to-end. Backend APIs working correctly. Admin Promo Codes tab had a critical bug (wrong localStorage key) that was fixed. All features verified after fix.

bugs_fixed.issue: CRITICAL: AdminPromoCodes and AdminLegalEditor components used localStorage.getItem('admin_token') but admin login stores token as 'cb_admin_token'. Caused 401 errors on all promo admin API calls, showing empty codes list.
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed both occurrences from 'admin_token' to 'cb_admin_token' at lines 106 and 370

features_verified.backend_validate_annual50: PASS — GET /api/promo/validate?code=ANNUAL50 returns type=discount, discount_percent=50.0, applicable_plan_type=annual
features_verified.backend_validate_fakecode: PASS — GET /api/promo/validate?code=FAKECODE returns 400 with error detail
features_verified.admin_promo_tab_loads: PASS — ANNUAL50 (green '50% off'), EXTEND30 (+30 days orange), EXTEND14 (+14 days orange) all visible
features_verified.admin_code_type_toggle: PASS — 'Time Extension' and '% Discount at Checkout' buttons visible in form
features_verified.admin_discount_fields: PASS — Selecting '% Discount at Checkout' shows 'Discount %' input and 'Applies To' field
features_verified.admin_create_discount_code: PASS — Created LAUNCH50 discount code, appears in table with green badge
features_verified.pricing_promo_section: PASS — 'Have a promo code?' collapsible visible on /pricing
features_verified.pricing_annual50_applied: PASS — ANNUAL50 shows green banner '50% off annual plans' with ANNUAL50 badge
features_verified.pricing_strikethrough_annual: PASS — Annual plan shows discounted price with strikethrough original
features_verified.pricing_monthly_not_discounted: PASS — Monthly plans NOT discounted when ANNUAL50 applied (annual-only code)
features_verified.pricing_remove_discount: PASS — Remove button clears discount banner and prices return to normal

critical_code_review_comments: AdminPage.js has inconsistent localStorage key usage — multiple sub-components use 'admin_token' while the login flow stores 'cb_admin_token'. Only 2 found and fixed; recommend auditing the full file for any remaining 'admin_token' references.
seed_data_creation: Created test code LAUNCH50 (50% discount) via admin panel during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Discount promo codes fully working. Admin panel shows codes with correct badges. Pricing page applies discount with strikethrough prices. Bug fixed: AdminPromoCodes was reading 'admin_token' instead of 'cb_admin_token' from localStorage causing 401s.
